message:
You know that one friend who always seems to panic at the slightest hiccup? Well, I’ve got one of those in my life, and it’s my dog, Max! Just the other day, I was rummaging through the pantry for a snack, and when I accidentally dropped a bag of chips, you’d think the world was ending. Max jumped back like he’d seen a ghost, barking his head off like he was trying to warn me of impending doom. 

It made me chuckle, but it also got me thinking about how important it is to stay calm and prepared, even when things go a little sideways. A little planning goes a long way in keeping the peace, whether it’s for us or our furry friends. 

Anyone else have a pet who takes things way too seriously? 🐾
